title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Power Grid Corporation

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Power Grid Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Power Grid Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Power Grid Corporation:
Power Grid Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation!
